_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Globe: Game 28 — Red Sox at Orioles preview and lineups as Boston proceeds without Cora
items.snark: First lineup of the post-Cora era and Tracy's just trying to remember which Mayer is which. Globe will run the same preview tomorrow with two adjective swaps.

items.headline: Over the Monster: Cora wasn't to blame for the Sox' slow start, but maybe it was time to move on
items.snark: OTM lands the Shaughnessy haymaker then folds in a 'but maybe though.' SB Nation house style: have the take, refund half of it.

items.headline: SI: Red Sox' season was doomed from the start, and firing Cora won't change that
items.snark: Payroll built like a Spirit flight to Buffalo, nobody up front can manage their way out of that. Stewardess didn't crash the plane.

items.headline: Pats Pulpit: Quick-hit thoughts on the Patriots' 2026 NFL Draft class
items.snark: Pulpit's quick hits: Lomu nasty, Jacas raw, Wolf maybe-OK. The 'maybe-OK' bit doing more lifting than the o-line did last year.

items.headline: Pats Pulpit: Full 2026 draft class grades — Lomu, Jacas, Raridon headline
items.snark: Lomu, Jacas, Raridon get the love; the Day 3 kids get a participation B-minus. Wolf grading himself with a calculator he bought.

items.headline: Pats Pulpit: UDFA tracker — every undrafted rookie New England signed
items.snark: Harvard lineman with a $5K signing bonus — dude could've made that buying back his Crimson Tide stock. Welcome to Foxborough.
